title: Aiguptos #0125
definition:
Egypt = "double straits"

 1) a country occupying the northeast angle of Africa
 2) metaph. Jerusalem, for the Jews persecuting the Christ and his
    followers, and so to be likened to the Egyptians treating the Jews
nasbUsage:
